item.description:
Release v4.2.3

Changes since v4.2.2

  • docs(appstoreconnect): add App Store Connect API reference documentation
  • feat(app-manager): add aboutView for AppManagerPlugin
  • feat(appstoreconnect): adopt version-centric distribution layout
  • feat(appstoreconnect): cache GET responses to speed up repeat loads
  • feat(chat): move conversation title header to ConversationTitlePlugin
  • feat(chat): restore context token usage in status bar timeline
  • feat(display-control): add dedicated about view for plugin introduction
  • feat(file-tree): add VS Code-style multi-select with batch actions
  • feat(plugins): add aboutView for all visible plugins
  • feat(plugins): add shared PluginAboutView and aboutView for configurable plugins
  • feat(plugins): localize AboutView for Simplified and Traditional Chinese
  • feat(settings): add DefaultPluginAboutView for all plugins
  • feat(update): add release notes display in Sparkle update dialog
  • feat(xcodekit): include local Swift Package sources in target file resolution
  • fix(appstoreconnect): load remote screenshots and extract screenshot API
  • fix(appstoreconnect): restore app list and toolbar picker flows
  • fix(chat): keep conversation visible when loading earlier messages
  • fix(ci): pin Sparkle appcast output path for release workflow
  • fix(logo): defer @published update to avoid SwiftUI warning
  • fix(lsp): restart SourceKit server when buildServerPath changes
